introSection: Montezum is a wooden roller coaster at Hopi Hari in Vinhedo, São Paulo, Brazil.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride opened in 1999.

The trains previously operated on the ride in reverse.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The trains are built by Philadelphia Toboggan Coasters.

sections.title: Incident
sections.content: On 11 December 2021, a lap bar became detached while the train was climbing the lift hill. It was held up in the air while other riders gestured with their arms to try and catch the attention of the ride operators. The coaster was eventually stopped and riders evacuated. It reopened the following day.

fullText:
Montezum is a wooden roller coaster at Hopi Hari in Vinhedo, São Paulo, Brazil.

The ride opened in 1999.

The trains previously operated on the ride in reverse.



White track and supports.

The trains are built by Philadelphia Toboggan Coasters.

On 11 December 2021, a lap bar became detached while the train was climbing the lift hill. It was held up in the air while other riders gestured with their arms to try and catch the attention of the ride operators. The coaster was eventually stopped and riders evacuated. It reopened the following day.
